overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a vibrant swamp wetland. The character walks through shallow water and grassy banks dotted with colorful wildflowers, passing a massive gnarled tree and abandoned wooden structures under bright daylight.

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow swamp water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers, entering the shallow swamp water

entered.detail: leafless trees with twisted branches framing the path on both sides
clusters of red poppies and purple lupines growing among the grass
shallow reflective water with aquatic plants covering the surface

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a vibrant swamp meadow filled with red and purple wildflowers. The character transitions from dry grassy terrain into shallow swamp water as scattered dead trees frame the path ahead.

events.description: large gnarled tree becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow swamp water toward a large distinctive tree

entered.detail: massive ancient tree with twisted bare branches towering over the landscape
derelict wooden wagon with broken wheels near the tree base

segments.scene_description: Wading through the shallow swamp, the character approaches a massive gnarled tree visible in the distance. The water reflects the bright sky as the abandoned wooden cart near the tree becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp clearing with massive ancient tree

events.description: sun flares behind the large gnarled tree creating strong backlighting
character navigates around the base of the large tree

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the large gnarled tree, moving from water onto grassy bank

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts marking a boundary near the tree
gentle green hill rising in the distance beyond the swamp

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the base of the enormous gnarled tree, passing wooden fence posts and an abandoned cart. Strong sunlight creates a dramatic flare behind the tree as the terrain mixes between grassy banks and shallow pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp wetlands with distant forest

events.description: moving away from the tree area into more open water

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water and grass toward an open grassy hill

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the edge of the swamp in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the tree into more open wetlands, the character continues through alternating patches of water and grass. The path leads toward a grassy hill slope with a distant forest tree line visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant swamp meadow that gradually transitions into an open wetland landscape. It begins with Geralt walking through dry grassy terrain filled with red and purple wildflowers before descending into shallow swamp water framed by scattered dead trees. As the character wades further, the scene opens up to reveal a massive gnarled tree and an abandoned wooden cart, with the water reflecting the bright sky. The camera then circles the base of the enormous tree and its surrounding fence posts, passing through a dramatic sun flare that illuminates the mix of grassy banks and shallow pools. Finally, the movement leads away from the tree and across alternating patches of water and grass toward a rising hill slope and a distant forest tree line.
